routines.name: double_value
routines.definition: (`input_value` int) RETURNS int DETERMINISTIC NO SQL SQL SECURITY INVOKER BEGIN RETURN input_value * 2; END

routines.name: set_value
routines.definition: (IN `input_value` int, OUT `output_value` int) MODIFIES SQL DATA SQL SECURITY INVOKER BEGIN SET output_value = input_value; END
